About Me

Full Stack Developer

BIO

Hi, I'm Des, and I'm a developer. On the front-end, my current toolset includes CSS3, HTML5, JavaScript and React. In back-end development, my current stack involves NodeJS and MongoDB. I write code everyday and I am continuously learning new technologies in order to become better at what I do. I'm currently available to do freelance work remotely, or here in Zimbabwe. If you have a project that you would like to get started, or you just need my help with something, please feel free to get in touch with me.
